title: Senior Freight Operations Executive
description:
What You Will Be Doing

Operational Management

  • Supervise and coordinate daily shipping operations to ensure smooth and timely transportation of goods.

  • Plan and manage consolidation boxes for overseas shipments.

  • Arrange and coordinate deliveries and pickups with all relevant parties, including logistics and warehouse teams.

Documentation & Compliance

  • Prepare and oversee accurate shipping documentation, including Bills of Lading, Permits, and Certificates of Origin.

  • Handle and declare all types of import/export permits.

  • Ensure compliance with international trade regulations, customs requirements, and company protocols.

Customer & Stakeholder Communication

  • Liaise with customers, co-loaders, and overseas agents for shipment arrangements and issue resolution.

  • Establish and maintain strong relationships with shipping vendors, carriers, and hauliers.

Monitoring & Improvement

  • Use and oversee systems to monitor shipments, billing, and documentation, ensuring accuracy and prompt updates.

  • Identify opportunities to optimize shipping efficiency and reduce costs.

  • Resolve shipping, transportation, or documentation issues to maintain service standards.

Other Duties

  • Provide support for ad-hoc projects or tasks assigned by management.

postedCompany.description:
Shipping World Logistics Pte Ltd has been a trusted logistics partner for over 20 years, helping businesses ship their products across the globe. With expertise in sea freight on Middle East and Intra-Asia trade routes, we are supported by a robust network of over 50 global agents. Our growing team of 30–40 professionals operates across offices in Singapore, Malaysia, and China, ensuring reliable and efficient service for our clients.

As an international freight forwarder and experienced logistics provider, we are dedicated to delivering a seamless experience for our customers. From handling complex freight forwarding needs to providing end-to-end logistical support, our focus is always on simplifying supply chains and creating value for our clients.

We are currently undergoing a digital transformation, modernizing operations with tools like Slack, Salesforce, and Zendesk to enhance efficiency and service standards. By blending technology with logistics expertise, we aim to stay competitive and deliver innovative solutions to our customers.

As we grow and expand our operations, we are looking for driven individuals to join us in reshaping the shipping industry. If you’re ready to grow with a dynamic team and make an impact, reach out to us to explore job opportunities!
postedCompany.name: SHIPPING WORLD LOGISTICS PTE LTD
